name: Pediococcus acidilactici PA53 Improves Emotional Well-Being and Gut Health while Modulating Microbiota Composition in Older Adults: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial
summary: A 2026 randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial testing Pediococcus acidilactici PA53 supplementation for emotional well-being, gastrointestinal symptoms, sleep quality, serum inflammatory biomarkers, and microbiota composition in healthy older adults.
